facts: The API documentation is on Swagger
C[deploy.approval]: Two senior engineer approvals required
C[deploy.window]: No deployments on Fridays after 2pm
C[cache.eviction]: LRU eviction when memory exceeds 80%
D[cache.strategy]: Cache-aside pattern for all read paths
query: What is the cache eviction policy?

facts: C[api.rate]: Maximum 1000 requests per minute per key
C[api.payload]: Request body must not exceed 10MB
query: What is the max request body size?

facts: C[security.encryption]: All data encrypted at rest with AES-256
C[security.transit]: TLS 1.3 minimum for all connections
V[security.officer]: Chief Security Officer is James Park
query: What encryption is used for data at rest?

facts: C[team.review]: All PRs require minimum 2 reviewers
query: How many reviewers are needed for PRs?

facts: C[compliance.pii]: PII must be tokenized before storage
C[compliance.logging]: No PII in application logs
D[compliance.framework]: SOC2 Type II certification path
V[compliance.dpo]: Data Protection Officer is Maria Santos
query: How should PII be handled in storage?

facts: D[infra.provider]: AWS for compute, Cloudflare for CDN
query: What are the RTO and RPO targets?
